name: Follow the format
instruction: Draft a mutual NDA between [PARTY A] and [PARTY B] using the same format as the attached document.
notes: Should mirror headings/numbering, NOT reuse Acme/Globex/Delaware facts.

name: Reframe with my data
instruction: Using the attached as a template, draft this NDA for Initech Inc. and Hooli Inc., effective March 1, 2026, governed by California law, with a 3-year term.
notes: Should follow the structure and fill in the supplied data.

name: Take inspiration (tone) on an edit
instruction: Make this clause mutual, taking tone inspiration from the attached.
selectionText: The Receiving Party shall not disclose Confidential Information to any third party.
notes: Edit mode; reference used loosely for tone.
